name: Evergreen Golf Club

why_golfers_like_it: Premium simulator technology for realistic play
Available for corporate team events and private functions

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar with cocktails and beverages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available onsite for those who don't have their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and beverages are available for purchase at the venue's bar and kitchen.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Simulated rounds typically take 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is welcoming to families and offers amenities suitable for golfers of all ages and skill levels.
